name: benbentwos-claude-marketplace
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins for documentation, development workflows, and productivity

plugins.name: feature-changelog
plugins.description: Helps maintain FEATURES.md and CHANGELOG.md documentation during development tasks

plugins.name: unreal-mcp-improver
plugins.description: Automatically detects, logs, and fixes SadTire MCP limitations in the background while users continue their main work

plugins.name: uem
plugins.description: Unreal Editor Manager - editor lifecycle management, AI-driven rebuilds, log analysis, and MCP integration for UE5

plugins.name: prd-manager
plugins.description: Manage Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) to gate feature development behind structured requirements and track implementation status
